    1. execute(ClientRemoteInterface)

Interface ServerToClientMessage

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ActionAvailableChangedMessage, AddedCardToTribeMessage, AskExtraDrawMessage, BoardInitializeMessages, BottomBuildRemovedMessage, BottomCardRemovedMessage, EraChangedMessage, ErrorMessage, GamePhaseChangedMessage, GameWinnersMessage, InitializeGameMessage, InitializeMarketMessage, OrderOnDefaultTileMessage, PlayerAddedMessage, PlayerDisconnectedMessage, PlayerDisconnectedMessage, PlayerPlacedOnOffertileMessage, PlayerReconnectedMessage, PlayerToPlaceChangedMessage, PlayerToPlayChangedMessage, PlayerUpdateFoodMessage, PlayerUpdatePPMessage, PongMessage, ResolvedEventMessage, SendRankMessage, TopBuildingRefreshedMessage, TopBuildRemovedMessage, TopCardRefreshedMessage, TopCardRemovedMessage
public interface ServerToClientMessage extends Serializable
Marker interface for all messages sent from the server to a Socket client. Each implementation wraps a single ClientRemoteInterface call so that the SocketClientHandler can dispatch it without knowing the concrete message type.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling the appropriate method on the client interface.

  • Method Details

    • execute

      void execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws Exception
      Dispatches this message by calling the appropriate method on the client interface.
      Parameters:
      clientRemoteInterface - the target client's remote interface.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the underlying call fails.
